title: graellsia hederifolia subsp. cossonii
intro: Graellsia hederifolia subsp. cossonii, also known as the Spanish valerian or valeriana, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Valerianaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, sedative, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Graellsia hederifolia subsp. cossonii include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as pain relief and improved sleep quality. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
